conflicts.description: The first emergency transfer is rendered as $350 in the live chapter 5-6 transaction scene, but later retrospective chapters restate it as $380 or $382.
conflicts.resolution_note: The live transaction scene gives the amount twice and shows the payment confirmation on page; the later higher figures only appear in retrospective summaries.

conflicts.description: The post-Union-Station motel payment is $280 in chapter 7, but later chapters restate the same after-D.C. transfer as $460, $600, or $640.
conflicts.canonical_value: Second transfer is $280 in late September 2027, tied to Noelle's motel room after the failed D.C. meeting.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 7 contains the actual ask, Lena's decision, and the confirmation pulse for the payment. The larger retrospective numbers are not supported by any dramatized transfer scene.

conflicts.description: The large DeLuca transfer is a $3,100 wire with a separate $25 fee in chapter 9, but later chapters restate it as a $2,400 or $2,940 wire and shift the date.
conflicts.canonical_value: Large transfer is a $3,100 wire in early October 2027, plus a separate $25 wire fee; the ring pawn is collateral, not an additional transfer amount.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 9 is the most causally embedded version because it includes the pawnshop step, the bank form, the tax-account transfer, and the exact wire confirmation. The lower retrospective figures appear only after the fact.

conflicts.description: The shore-false-lead, trailer-cleanout, and reveal sequence carries conflicting month markers: chapter 12 says the Wildwood search is barely mid-October, chapter 13 says late October, chapter 14 says Lena is back from the trailer within two hours but also labels the evening late November, and the OpenClaw log timestamps shore-trip blowback on 11/02/27.
conflicts.canonical_value: Treat the Wildwood false lead, trailer cleanout, and storm-night reveal as one late-October to early-November 2027 sequence, with the reveal best anchored to early November.
conflicts.resolution_note: The chapter-13-to-14 handoff is explicit and same-day, and the 11/02/27 OpenClaw note is the strongest hard timestamp inside that stretch. The isolated month labels conflict with each other, so the reconciled sheet keeps the narrower late-autumn window instead of preserving a false single month.
